title: ehrharta oreophila
intro: Ehrharta oreophila, also known as the alpine button grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ehrharta oreophila include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
